message:
🐛 Fix detail panel hover jitter when moving between run dots (#1125)

Adds a 50ms debounce to hoveredRun state clearing so moving the mouse
between adjacent dots doesn't flash the detail panel back to average view.
When entering a new dot, the pending clear is cancelled immediately.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
